plan_metadata.title: Phase 1 Remediation R1 - Routing Disambiguation and UI Scope Clarity

current_state_assumption.reason: Phase 2 warning remediation already moved test paths out of source scope and added file_scope_resolution, service_scope, and candidate_file_classification metadata.

plan_metadata.scope: Apply targeted Phase 1 catalog/schema improvements that remain valid after Phase 2 warning remediation. This plan does not re-run Phase 1 generation and does not modify canonical source artifacts.
plan_metadata.governing_rule: Derived catalog metadata may clarify routing and dependency interpretation, but canonical documents remain authoritative.

ISSUE-001.title: Temporary helper script placement
ISSUE-001.description: Phase helpers must not be written under .state/evidence because a crash could leave non-evidence artifacts in the audit trail.
ISSUE-001.resolution: Use a root-level scratch helper named _ph01_r1_execute.py or a top-level _scratch/ directory, then delete it before completion.

ISSUE-002.title: Deprecated jsonschema CLI
ISSUE-002.description: python -m jsonschema emits a deprecation warning and should not be the primary CLI validation mechanism.
ISSUE-002.resolution: Use in-process Draft202012Validator as the required validator. If check-jsonschema is already installed, run it as an optional independent CLI check. Do not install packages as part of this remediation unless explicitly requested.

ISSUE-003.title: B1 and B2 dual work-cell ambiguity
ISSUE-003.description: B1_MT4_ADAPTER_TRANSPORT and B2_MT4_EA_EXECUTOR each have a Python-side work cell and an MQL4/EA-side work cell. Routing by parent_module_symbol alone is ambiguous.
ISSUE-003.resolution: Add requires_agent_capability to all work cells. Validate uniqueness only for the known ambiguous B1/B2 dual-cell modules, not globally.

ISSUE-004.title: UI work cells use SHARED_LIBS as parent proxy
ISSUE-004.description: UI work cells are parented to SHARED_LIBS because module_catalog.json has no dedicated UI module. Agents must not infer UI dependency constraints from SHARED_LIBS.
ISSUE-004.resolution: Add dependency_scope_override_note to every ui_screen and ui_gateway work cell. Preserve existing file_scope_resolution=service_scope metadata from Phase 2 warning remediation.

artifacts.purpose: Confirms canonical module IDs and SHARED_LIBS parent proxy status.
Read-only guard to ensure Phase 2 warning remediation remains intact.
Parent decomposition model. Remediation must not contradict its work-cell definitions.

records.change_summary: Add optional work-cell properties requires_agent_capability and dependency_scope_override_note. Preserve existing Phase 2 remediation fields file_scope_resolution, service_scope, and candidate_file_classification.

Increment catalog_metadata.version from 1.0.2 to 1.0.3, add requires_agent_capability to every work cell, and add dependency_scope_override_note to all ui_screen/ui_gateway work cells. Do not change source_files, test_files, allowed dependencies, forbidden dependencies, or service-scope metadata.
Regenerate Phase 1 catalog validation report with original Phase 1 gates plus remediation gates.
Regenerate Phase 1 summary with remediation_plan_id PH-01-R1 and catalog version 1.0.3.
Record issue resolution, gate statuses, optional check-jsonschema status, and hashes of updated schema/catalog.

ui_dependency_scope_override_note: DEPENDENCY SCOPE: Use this work cell's own allowed_dependencies and forbidden_dependencies. Do not derive dependency constraints from parent module SHARED_LIBS in module_catalog.json. SHARED_LIBS is used as a Phase 1 parent proxy because module_catalog.json defines no dedicated canonical UI module. File scope is governed by this work cell's service_scope metadata and ui_catalog.json.

phase_plan.name: Phase 1 Remediation R1
phase_plan.description: Apply routing and dependency-scope metadata to the Phase 1 catalog after Phase 2 warning remediation.

steps.name: Verify authoritative and constraining artifact hashes

gates.title: Updated schema is valid and backward compatible
gates.pass_condition: submodule_catalog_schema.json is valid Draft 2020-12 JSON Schema; requires_agent_capability and dependency_scope_override_note exist under work_cells.items.properties and are not added to work_cells.items.required.

gates.title: All work cells have routing capability metadata
gates.pass_condition: Every work cell has requires_agent_capability as a non-empty array and the catalog validates against submodule_catalog_schema.json.

gates.title: Only B1 and B2 dual-cell ambiguity is checked
gates.pass_condition: For B1_MT4_ADAPTER_TRANSPORT and B2_MT4_EA_EXECUTOR, each module has exactly one python-capable work cell and exactly one mql4-capable work cell. This gate does not require global uniqueness for R1, S1, SHARED_LIBS, or other intentionally decomposed modules.

gates.title: UI work cells have explicit dependency-scope override
gates.pass_condition: Every work cell with work_cell_type ui_screen or ui_gateway has dependency_scope_override_note, file_scope_resolution == service_scope, and service_scope includes dashboard-backend, desktop-ui, and gui-gateway.

gates.title: Phase 2 warning remediation remains intact
gates.pass_condition: .state/evidence/PH-02/STEP-005/packet_validation_report.json still reports warning_count == 0 and warnings == []; no test paths appear in work_cell source_files.

gates.title: No canonical artifact modified
gates.pass_condition: CA-001 through CA-009 hashes match .state/evidence/PH-01/STEP-001/context_artifact_verification.json. CA-010 and CA-011 are also unchanged if present in the baseline.

gates.title: Remediation evidence is complete
gates.pass_condition: .state/evidence/PH-01-R1/remediation_summary.json records issues_resolved containing ISSUE-001 through ISSUE-004, catalog_version == 1.0.3, process_scratch_convention_documented == true, and overall_status == PASS.

anti_pattern_detection.name: global_dual_cell_uniqueness_gate
anti_pattern_detection.trigger: A validation gate requires all (parent_module_symbol, requires_agent_capability) pairs to be globally unique.
anti_pattern_detection.action: Halt and narrow the gate to B1_MT4_ADAPTER_TRANSPORT and B2_MT4_EA_EXECUTOR only.

anti_pattern_detection.name: phase_2_metadata_regression
anti_pattern_detection.trigger: file_scope_resolution, service_scope, candidate_file_classification, or zero-warning Phase 2 evidence is removed or overwritten.
anti_pattern_detection.action: Halt and restore the Phase 2 warning remediation fields.

anti_pattern_detection.name: package_install_without_user_request
anti_pattern_detection.trigger: The remediation attempts to install check-jsonschema or any package automatically.
anti_pattern_detection.action: Halt; use in-process JSON Schema validation and record check-jsonschema as not_available if absent.

anti_pattern_detection.name: canonical_artifact_mutation
anti_pattern_detection.trigger: Any CA-001 through CA-011 artifact changes during remediation.
anti_pattern_detection.action: Halt; restore the artifact and rerun from baseline.

definition_of_done: submodule_catalog_schema.json validates and includes the two optional R1 fields.
B1 and B2 each have distinct python and mql4 capability routing.
All UI work cells have dependency_scope_override_note and retain service_scope metadata.
Phase 2 warning remediation remains at zero warnings.
No authoritative or constraining context artifact is modified.

execution_notes.scratch_script_rule: If a helper script is used, write it at repo root as _ph01_r1_execute.py and delete it before completion. Do not write helper scripts under .state/evidence.
execution_notes.no_package_install_rule: Do not install check-jsonschema automatically. If it is already available, record its version and exit code; otherwise record not_available and rely on Draft202012Validator.
execution_notes.no_phase_regeneration_rule: Do not re-run full Phase 1 generation. Apply only declared metadata changes to the existing 1.0.2 catalog.
